title: Deep Synthesis Quality Fix + Multi-Shot Refinement (MSR) + Verbose Trace
motivation: User ran `octane ask 'israel iran latest news' --deep` — 13 pages extracted, 3 rounds, 114,889ms — but synthesis was only 3 sentences
Root cause: synthesizer.py had max_tokens=768, tier=MID, article cap of 5 — designed for brief bullet output, not long-form intelligence
User requirement: 'octane is used for long form horizon planning — it needs to be 100x thorough than any google search'
User requirement: 'octane trace should be VERBOSE — every website, every chunk, every reasoning — every detail should be visible'
User requirement: MSR (Multi-Shot Refinement) — after Round-1 scouting, ask MCQ clarifying questions to focus the deep search

F1_deep_synthesis.description: deep=True path uses REASON tier (8B model), 3000 tokens, 10 articles, structured multi-section report prompt
changes: New constant _DEEP_SYNTHESIS_SYSTEM_BASE — multi-section report template (Summary, Key Developments, Background, International Reactions, What's Next, Sources)
_deep_synthesis_system() helper — injects today's date into the template
synthesize_with_content(query, extracted_articles, deep=False) — new deep param
deep=True: ModelTier.REASON, max_tokens=3000, article_limit=10, timeout=120s
deep=False: unchanged — ModelTier.MID, max_tokens=768, article_limit=5, timeout=40s
_MAX_CHARS_DIRECT_DEEP = 8000 (vs 3000 standard) — allows larger direct synthesis windows
_MAX_CHARS_CHUNK_DEEP = 14000 (vs 7000 standard) — larger chunk summaries
_summarize_chunk(text, query, deep=False) — 600 tokens deep vs 350 standard

F2_msr_decider.description: New file — MSRDecider evaluates Round-1 findings and decides if query needs MCQ clarification

classes.MSRQuestion: dataclass with text: str, options: list[str]
classes.MSRResult: dataclass with should_ask: bool, questions: list[MSRQuestion]

MSRDecider.init: MSRDecider(bodega=None) — no bodega → always returns should_ask=False
MSRDecider.tier: ModelTier.FAST (90M) — classification task, must be fast
MSRDecider.safety: Returns MSRResult(should_ask=False) on ANY error — graceful degradation
MSRDecider.guards: Empty findings → skip LLM call, return should_ask=False immediately

F3_depth_analyzer_user_context.description: generate_followups gains user_context param — MSR answers steer follow-up query generation
changes: generate_followups(original_query, findings, max_followups=4, user_context=None)
When user_context is not None, injects 'User specifically wants to focus on: {user_context}' into LLM prompt

F4_web_agent_msr_wiring.description: WebAgent emits Synapse events and runs MSR clarification flow
changes: New _emit(correlation_id, event_type, payload) helper — silently swallows all exceptions
MSRDecider instantiated in __init__: self._msr_decider = MSRDecider(bodega=bodega)
Both _fetch_news and _fetch_search emit: web_search_round, msr_decision, msr_answers (conditional), web_depth_analysis, web_synthesis
MSR block: if deep and r1_usable: → get clarification_hook from request.context → MSRDecider.decide() → if should_ask: hook(questions) → user_context
user_context flows into DepthAnalyzer.generate_followups(user_context=user_context)
synthesize_with_content(..., deep=deep) — deep passed through in both fetch methods

event_types.web_search_round: Emitted after each extraction round — payload: round, sub_agent, queries, urls_found, pages_extracted, urls, extracted_detail
event_types.msr_decision: Emitted after MSRDecider.decide() — payload: should_ask, n_questions, questions
event_types.msr_answers: Emitted when user responds to MCQ — payload: user_context
event_types.web_depth_analysis: Emitted after generate_followups() — payload: round, n_followups, followup_queries, user_context
event_types.web_synthesis: Emitted before synthesis call — payload: n_articles, deep, mode (direct/chunked)

F5_orchestrator_hook_threading.description: run_stream() accepts clarification_hook and injects it into AgentRequest.context
changes: run_stream(query, session_id='cli', conversation_history=None, extra_metadata=None, clarification_hook=None)
When clarification_hook is not None: task_context['clarification_hook'] = clarification_hook
Callable injected directly into context dict (not serialized — callables can't go in JSON metadata)

F6_verbose_trace.description: octane trace --verbose renders per-URL tables, extracted page details, follow-up queries, MSR decisions, synthesis parameters
changes: trace(correlation_id=None, verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, '--verbose', '-v'))
_trace(correlation_id, verbose=False) — passes verbose to rendering logic
New _print_verbose_web_trace(events, t0) function — renders all web-tier events in detail
web_search_round: URL table (URL, extracted/skipped), extracted pages table (method, chars, words)
web_depth_analysis: follow-up query table (query, api, rationale)
msr_decision + msr_answers: MSR question list + user answer
web_synthesis: tier, tokens, mode, n_articles
Non-verbose mode shows hint: 'N web events hidden — use -v to see every URL and chunk'
New entries in _EVENT_COLOURS and _EVENT_ICONS for all 5 new event types
Variable rename: spin (was 'status') to avoid collision with pre-flight status dict

F7_clarification_hook_cli.description: clarification_hook factory in _ask() — shows MCQ questions to user in terminal
changes: async clarification_hook(questions: list[MSRQuestion]) -> str | None
Shows Rich Panel: 'Octane wants to focus your deep search'
For each question (1/N): prints text + A/B/C/D options + '↵ Skip'
Reads input via asyncio loop.run_in_executor(None, lambda: input(...))
Maps letter (a/b/c/d) → option text, empty → skip
Returns 'Q1: answer1; Q2: answer2' or None if all skipped
hook = clarification_hook if deep else None — only active for --deep queries

classes.TestSynthesizerDeepMode: 9 tests — deep prompt existence, REASON tier, 3000 tokens, 10 articles, higher char threshold, LLM call verification, standard mode unchanged
classes.TestMSRDecider: 10 tests — dataclass existence, no-bodega fallback, empty-findings guard, should_ask=False/True parsing, think-block stripping, max_questions cap, LLM error handling, bad JSON handling, FAST tier assertion
classes.TestDepthAnalyzerUserContext: 3 tests — user_context param signature, prompt injection verification, no-context backward compat
classes.TestWebAgentSynapseEvents: 8 tests — _emit helper existence/signature, SynapseEvent import, all 4 new event type assertions, _emit never raises, MSRDecider wired
classes.TestWebAgentMSRWiring: 3 tests — hook called when MSR triggers, hook not called when MSR skips, no-hook skips MSRDecider entirely
classes.TestOrchestratorClarificationHook: 2 tests — run_stream parameter existence, context injection in source
classes.TestTraceVerboseRendering: 6 tests — verbose flag, _print_verbose_web_trace function, empty-events handling, _EVENT_COLOURS entries, _EVENT_ICONS entries, _trace verbose param

architecture_notes.msr_flow: Round-1 scout → MSRDecider (90M FAST) → if ambiguous → clarification_hook (CLI MCQ) → user_context str → DepthAnalyzer (steers follow-up queries) → Round-2+ with user focus
architecture_notes.hook_injection: clarification_hook is an async callable — injected into AgentRequest.context dict (not metadata JSON, since callables are not serializable)
architecture_notes.graceful_degradation: MSR is entirely optional: if bodega=None, if findings empty, if no hook in context, or if any error → silently skips, pipeline continues normally
architecture_notes.synapse_events: 5 new event types enable octane trace -v to reconstruct the full web research timeline with per-URL granularity
architecture_notes.synthesis_budget: deep=True target: 700-1200 word structured report. standard: concise 3-5 bullet points

regressions: none — 236 pre-existing tests all continue to pass
